news.headline: Trump: Steel executives are all building plants in the US.
Fitch Ratings: Sharper economic slowdown in the US would significantly weigh on non-tariff revenues and increase spending via automatic stabilizers.
Trump: I spoke with steel industry executives last couple of days.

news.summary: The United States has imposed a steep 104% tariff on Chinese imports. This move signifies a significant escalation in trade tensions between the two economic powerhouses. The implications of this decision are expected to have a substantial impact on global trade relations and could potentially lead to retaliatory measures from China. This development was announced on the latest edition of "Balance of Power" on April 8, 2025.
news.headline: US imposes 104% tariff on China in late news update on 04/08/2025. No source mentioned.
Fitch Ratings: Stabilising US debt/GDP will be challenging as long as long-term spending pressures remain unaddressed.

news.summary: Based in Beaverton, Oregon, Pacific Office Automation (POA) has revealed their sponsorship of LPGA professional golfer Gigi Stoll. The collaboration signifies POA's focus on excellence and innovation, resonating with Stoll's exceptional performance on the LPGA Tour. Hailing from Oregon, Stoll has showcased remarkable skill in golf since youth. She currently holds the 49th position on the LPGA's Race to CME Globe Points List, solidifying her stature as a prominent figure in the sport.
news.headline: Pacific Office Automation sponsors LPGA rising star Gigi Stoll, ranked 49th on LPGA’s Race to CME Globe Points List.
Trump: We're protecting our steelworkers and industry.

news.summary: US President Donald Trump has imposed 104% tariffs on Chinese imports, prompting Beijing to weaken the yuan against the dollar. This move can potentially drive Chinese capital flow into hard assets like Bitcoin, according to analysts. The yuan-to-US dollar exchange rate fell to its lowest level since 2023 on April 8. BitMEX founder Arthur Hayes and Bybit's CEO Ben Zhou predict a rise in Chinese investment in Bitcoin due to the devaluation of the yuan in response to the trade war. The US dollar has declined since Trump's inauguration and is expected to exhibit volatility amid escalating trade tensions. The DXY Dollar Index has fallen from nearly 110 to sub-103 levels, with the USD showing weakness. Historically, Bitcoin has shown an inverse relationship with the US dollar, leading to a potential bullish trend for Bitcoin in the current scenario.
news.headline: Chinese capital flocking to crypto due to weakened yuan vs. USD amid escalating trade war; analysts predict bullish trend for Bitcoin (BTC).
Trump: Billions of dollars in federal funding will be used to invest in next-generation coal tech.
Trump: We have tariffs on cars, lumber and steel.
Fitch Ratings: US tariffs have a mixed fiscal impact and will not solve underlying challenges.
Trump reiterates: Tariffs are on.
Trump: I've had tariff talks with more than 70 countries.
Trump: Japan is flying here to make a deal and so is South Korea.
Trump: We're doing well on tailored tariff deals.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global population has surpassed 7.8 billion people, with Asia being the most populous continent, accounting for over 4.6 billion of the total population. The report also highlighted that the world's urban population has reached 4.2 billion, with over half of the global population now living in urban areas. Furthermore, it was noted that the COVID-19 pandemic has had a significant impact on migration patterns, with an estimated 281 million migrants worldwide. This data underscores the increasing interconnectedness and diversity of the global population.
news.headline: Record number of ETFs selling, causing cracks in CLO market.
Trump: We are taking $2 bln in a day from tariffs.

news.summary: BETHESDA, Md.--JBG SMITH, a prominent owner and developer of mixed-use properties in the Washington, DC market, disclosed that it will release its first quarter 2025 financial results on April 29, 2025, after the market closes. The Company's quarterly investor package, containing the earnings release, will be accessible on its website at investors.jbgsmith.com. JBG SMITH, listed as JBGS on the NYSE, specializes in managing and constructing mixed-use properties in the region.
news.headline: JBG SMITH to reveal Q1 2025 results on April 29, 2025. Leading DC property developer. NYSE: JBGS. Visit investors.jbgsmith.com.

Trump: Executive order will streamline permitting for coal.

news.summary: Tuesday witnessed significant volatility in the major stock indexes as they fluctuated between positive and negative territories. Noteworthy were the positive performances of Nvidia and Palantir in today's market. Investors experienced uncertainty as the indexes remained negative amid fluctuating trends. The day’s trading activities were highlighted by the anticipation of tariffs coming into effect.
news.headline: Stock market sees volatility as indexes swing between positive and negative. Nvidia and Palantir stocks stand out.

news.summary: In Vancouver, BC, on April 8, 2025, Sandstorm Gold Ltd. (NYSE: SAND) (TSX: SSL) shared their first quarter results up to March 31, 2025. The company reported sales, revenue, and other key metrics in U.S. dollars.

news.summary: In Ridgeland, Mississippi, Cal-Maine Foods, Inc. (NASDAQ: CALM) disclosed its financial and operational outcomes for the third quarter of fiscal 2025 spanning thirteen weeks until March 1, 2025. The company later revealed that post the fiscal quarter, it finalized a deal to procure Echo Lake Foods, Inc. In the highlights for the third quarter of fiscal 2025, they reported quarterly net sales totaling $1.4 billion.
news.headline: Cal-Maine Foods reports Q3 fiscal 2025 results with net sales of $1.4 billion. Announces agreement to acquire Echo Lake Foods.
Trump: Under the executive order, we'll slash regulation that targets coal.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, Group 1 Automotive, Inc. (NYSE: GPI), a distinguished automotive retailer ranking in the Fortune 250, disclosed its plans to unveil the financial outcomes for the initial quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The company, operating 260 dealerships across the United States and United Kingdom, is set to present key figures and insights regarding its performance during this period.
news.headline: Group 1 Automotive will release Q1 2025 financial results for its 260 dealerships in the U.S. and U.K. on April 8, 2025.
Trump: We'll give a guarantee coal business can't be terminated.

news.summary: The Board of Directors at The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) has announced a rise in the quarterly dividend to $1.0568 per share for Common Stock, Series A, and Series B ESOP Convertible Class A Preferred Stock. The dividend will be payable on or after May 15, 2025 to Common Stock shareholders recorded by April 21, 2025, and to Series A and Series B ESOP Convertible Class A Preferred Stock shareholders at the start of business.
news.headline: P&G raises quarterly dividend to $1.0568 per share for Common Stock and preferred stock, payable from May 15, 2025.

news.summary: In Vero Beach, Florida, on April 8, 2025, Bimini Capital Management, Inc. (OTCQB:BMNM) revealed plans to unveil its first quarter 2025 earnings after market closure on Thursday, May 1, 2025.
news.headline: Bimini Capital Management will reveal Q1 2025 results on May 1, 2025, after market close. OTBQB: BMNM.

news.summary: In December 2024, Invalda INVL disclosed that its equity stood at EUR 222 million, equivalent to EUR 18.48 per share. This represented a significant increase of 25.4% from the previous year. The rise in equity per share was also notable, growing by 25.3% when factoring in dividends distributed in the previous year.
news.headline: Invalda INVL Group shows equity of EUR 222M in 2024, up 25.4% from previous year, EUR 18.48 per share.

news.summary: On April 08, 2025, Royalty Pharma plc (Nasdaq: RPRX) appointed Vlad Coric, M.D. to its Board of Directors. Coric is currently the Chairman and CEO of Biohaven, a biopharmaceutical firm specializing in developing and marketing transformative therapies in critical fields like neuroscience, immunology, and oncology. This addition brings Coric’s expertise to the board, enhancing Royalty Pharma’s leadership with his extensive experience in the healthcare industry. This move signifies Royalty Pharma’s strategic focus on bolstering its leadership team to drive innovation and growth in the pharmaceutical sector.
news.headline: Royalty Pharma names Vlad Coric, M.D. to Board of Directors. Coric is Chairman/CEO of Biohaven. Effective immediately.

news.summary: Today, Capital City Bank Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: CCBG) stated that they are set to disclose their first quarter 2025 earnings on Monday, April 21, 2025, ahead of the market opening. Interested stakeholders can obtain a copy of the financial results on the Company's Investor Relations webpage, investors.ccbg.com.
news.headline: Capital City Bank to announce Q1 2025 earnings on April 21, 2025; info available at investors.ccbg.com.

news.summary: TriplePoint Venture Growth BDC Corp. (NYSE: TPVG), based in Menlo Park, California, has received confirmation from Morningstar DBRS that the Company maintains an investment grade Long-Term Issuer Rating and Long-Term Senior Debt Rating of BBB (low). TPVG is a prominent financing provider to venture growth stage companies supported by a specific group of venture capital firms in technology and other high-growth sectors. Morningstar DBRS recently released a statement regarding the reaffirmation of TPVG's ratings.
news.headline: Morningstar DBRS confirms investment grade rating BBB (low) for TPVG, a leading financing provider for growth stage companies.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, Globalink Investment Inc. (OTC Pink: GLLI, GLLIW, GLLIR, GLLIU), a special purpose acquisition company, extended its deadline to complete its initial business combination by depositing $60,000 into its Trust Account with Continental Stock Transfer and Trust Company. This marks the twenty-second extension since the company's initial public offering on December 9, 2021, and is the fifth extension out of a maximum of six allowed under its current governing documents. The new deadline is set for May 9, 2025.
news.headline: Globalink Investment Inc. extends deadline with an initial $60,000 deposit, setting new business combination deadline to May 9, 2025, marking the fifth of up to six allowed extensions post-IPO on December 9, 2021.

news.summary: AMN Healthcare Services, Inc. (NYSE: AMN) has announced that it will be holding a conference call on Thursday, May 8, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time to discuss its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 and provide an outlook for the second quarter of 2025. The company is set to release its earnings news after the market closes at around 4:15 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day.
news.headline: AMN Healthcare (NYSE: AMN) to host Q1 2025 earnings conference call on May 8, 2025, at 5:00 pm ET, with earnings release at 4:15 pm.

news.summary: NioBay Metals Inc. has recently been granted a grant under the Mining Exploration Support Program for Critical and Strategic Minerals by the Ministry of Natural Resources and Forests for its Crevier 2 niobium & tantalum project. The project, an extension of the original Crevier project, is situated around 50 km north of Girardville and 150 km from the Niobec mine. The Crevier Project falls within the Nitassinan belonging to the Pekuakamiulnuatsh community, with Mashteuiatsh as its central population center. This announcement was made by NioBay, listed on the TSX-V as NBY and OTCQB as NBYCF.
news.headline: NioBay Metals Inc. receives $400,000 grant for Crevier 2 niobium & tantalum project. Project located 50km north of Girardville.

news.summary: AMD, listed on NASDAQ as AMD, disclosed its plans to unveil fiscal first quarter 2025 financial figures on May 6, 2025. The report is set to be released after the market closes, with a subsequent conference call scheduled at 5:00 p.m. EDT / 2:00 p.m. PDT on the same day. Those interested can tune in to the webcast of the conference call through the company's Investor Relations site at ir.amd.com.
news.headline: AMD will report fiscal Q1 2025 results on May 6, 2025, after market close with a conference call at 5:00 p.m. EDT.

news.summary: Bank of America Corporation, based in Charlotte, N.C., declared on April 8, 2025, that its Board of Directors has approved regular cash dividends for the outstanding shares or depositary shares of certain preferred stock series. The specific amount of dividend per share for each series was also disclosed. This update is indicative of the financial health and stability of the company, providing consistent returns to its preferred stockholders.
news.headline: Bank of America announces preferred stock dividends payable in May and June 2025. Board authorizes regular cash dividends on outstanding shares of preferred stock.

news.summary: In Salt Lake City on April 8, 2025, Myriad Genetics, Inc. (NASDAQ: MYGN), a prominent player in molecular diagnostics testing and precision medicine, revealed that the Board of Directors has approved the granting of restricted stock units to Mr. Donnelly, the newly appointed chief commercial officer. The total value of these restricted stock units amounts to $3.75 million, with $2 million allocated to time-based restricted stock units (RSUs) and $1.75 million designated for performance-based restricted stock units (PSUs). These equity incentives were put forth on the first day of Mr. Donnelly's employment and are considered significant inducements for his hiring as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.headline: Myriad Genetics awards new chief commercial officer Mr. Donnelly $3.75 million in restricted stock units as per NASDAQ rules.

news.summary: Isabella Bank Corporation, based in Mount Pleasant, Michigan, is actively working towards uplisting its common shares on the Nasdaq Capital Market, in spite of recent challenges. The company, which is the parent company of Isabella Bank, is keen on making this move to enhance its market presence. This effort comes amidst disruptions in the financial markets. It is a significant step for the corporation (OTCQX: ISBA) to transition to a major stock exchange like Nasdaq. This strategic decision reflects the company's aim to expand its reach and attract more investors.
news.headline: Isabella Bank Corp. (OTCQX: ISBA) still seeking Nasdaq uplisting despite recent challenges.

news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee, on April 8, 2025, Brookdale Senior Living Inc. (NYSE: BKD) disclosed its latest occupancy figures for March 2025. The report showed a notable increase in occupancy rates compared to the previous year, with a 160 basis points rise to reach 79.5% as the weighted average for March. Additionally, there was a 20 basis points growth observed in comparison to the previous month.
news.headline: Brookdale Senior Living reported occupancy in March 2025: 79.5%, up 160 basis points from last year.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, Laureate Education, Inc. (NASDAQ: LAUR) announced their intention to unveil their financial results for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2025, on May 1, 2025, prior to the opening of the stock market. Subsequently, they will conduct a conference call with investors and analysts at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to review the first-quarter performance and the firm's future prospects.
news.headline: Laureate Education to release Q1 2025 results on May 1, 2025, before market opens. Conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET.

news.summary: In Tulsa, Oklahoma, on April 8, 2025, ONE Gas, Inc. (NYSE: OGS) announced that they are set to unveil their financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on Monday, May 5, 2025, after the market closes. Following this release, the executive management team of ONE Gas will engage in a conference call on Tuesday, May 6, 2025.
news.headline: ONE Gas will release Q1 2025 financial results on May 5, 2025. Conference call to take place on May 6, 2025.
